what_it_does: Hosts an external vanilla-JS "DNA" gallery renderer inside a React surface, providing a stable DOM container React never reconciles, binding a projection drill once, and orchestrating modal open/close for corpus drill-ins and decision cards via custom window events and URL deep-links.
observations: Declares a global Window.DNA interface with bindProjectionDrill and renderGallery methods.
Uses a module-level `bound` boolean to guard binding the projection drill against React StrictMode double-invocation.
The #gallery-mount div is rendered empty so DNA can own its innerHTML without React reconciliation.
Listens to gallery:rendered, gallery:rerender, decision:rendered, decision:open, projection:select, and keydown events.
Tracks decision-mode, current address, subtype, render_kind, and from-inbox origin in refs to manage lifecycle and close behavior.
openDecision polls renderGallery every 250ms up to ~80 attempts and clears the container innerHTML first to avoid stale-card bugs.
Passes a grounded resolve override from makeGroundedResolve into DNA.renderGallery when available.
Emits a host-level decision:ready custom event after a decision card renders.
Toggles a body class to hide competing chrome when the modal is open.
Supports a ?decide= URL deep-link and an inbox-driven decision:open event through the same opener path.
standouts: The explicit "UNION-SEAM WELD" for gallery:rerender that refreshes the currently mounted face after a write.
The decisionModeRef guard that prevents a wheel deselect from closing an active decision walk.
The stale-card guard in openDecision that clears innerHTML and matches data-decision-address before considering a render successful.
The stable React-agnostic container pattern for integrating an external renderer.
conventions: React hooks: useEffect with cleanup, useRef, useCallback, useState.
Custom event-driven cross-module communication on window.
Module-level mutable state for one-time binding guard.
Direct DOM manipulation (innerHTML, setAttribute) inside React for external renderer integration.
Relative API calls proxied through the surface host to avoid CORS.
TypeScript global augmentation for runtime-injected dependencies.
concerns: Module-level `bound` persists across hot reloads and tests; if binding fails once it stays false only until success, but true persists even if the component is remounted in a different context.
openDecision can leave the overlay open with a perpetual "Opening this decision…" state if renderGallery never succeeds or never fires decision:rendered.
Clearing container.innerHTML may destroy DNA-attached listeners or internal refs if DNA expects in-place updates.
The rerender handler relies on currentAddrRef but does not reset it on close/dismiss, so a stale address could trigger an unexpected refresh.
makeGroundedResolve behavior depends on an unseen feature flag and external API contract.
Polling with fixed 250ms intervals is a blunt retry mechanism for an async render operation.
notes: This is the React-side mount host that keeps DNA's gallery face alive in a stable DOM node and wires together corpus drill, decision cards, rerender refresh, and deep-link loading.
questions: Where and when is window.DNA actually loaded, and what guarantees its presence before this component mounts?
What exactly fires gallery:rerender and what is the full detail contract beyond element_id?
How does makeGroundedResolve decide whether to return a resolver and what payload shape does it produce?
What UI owns openDecisionsList and how does the from-inbox close-to-queue flow coordinate with it?
Are there tests covering StrictMode double-binding, stale-card prevention, and the rerender weld?
intention_signals: The file is trying to be a single, stable host surface that lets a non-React gallery renderer plug into a React app, unifying corpus drill-ins and decision-card flows while surviving React re-renders and making post-write refreshes visible.
novelty: The unusually explicit seam-weld commentary, the decision-mode ref to isolate decision walks from wheel selection, the polling openDecision with stale-card guard, and the injection of a host-supplied grounded resolve override into DNA's renderGallery.
contribution: A reusable mount host that isolates React reconciliation from an external gallery renderer, centralizes lifecycle handling for both corpus drill and decision-card flows, and adds rerender refresh plus a decision-ready signal for consumers.
summary_for_embedding: GalleryMount.tsx is a React component that hosts an external DNA gallery renderer in a stable DOM container, binds projection drill events, and manages modal display for corpus drill-ins and decision cards including deep-links, rerender refresh, and inbox queue return.
intention_for_embedding: Provide a React-compatible mount point and lifecycle orchestrator for the DNA gallery face so corpus drill-ins and decision cards can open, refresh, and close without React destroying the renderer's DOM.

symbols.does: Augments the global Window interface to type DNA's injected renderer API.
symbols.description: Declares Window.DNA with optional bindProjectionDrill and renderGallery methods, giving TypeScript visibility to the runtime-injected vanilla-JS gallery engine without importing it.

symbols.does: Renders the gallery modal overlay and orchestrates the external DNA renderer lifecycle.
symbols.description: The exported React component creates a stable #gallery-mount container, binds the projection drill once, listens for gallery and decision events, handles deep-links and inbox opens, and toggles modal chrome suppression while exposing open/close state via onOpenChange.

symbols.code_id: code://company/surface/app/src/gallery/GalleryMount.tsx::setTitle | function | const setTitle = (addr: string, fallback: string) => {
symbols.does: Updates the accessible label of the gallery frame from an address or fallback text.
symbols.description: A small helper inside the event-listening effect that writes the last path segment of the current address, or a fallback, into titleRef's aria-label for screen readers and frame identification.

symbols.does: Opens the modal when DNA finishes rendering a corpus gallery face.
symbols.description: Handles gallery:rendered by clearing decision mode, recording the address, resetting decision metadata, setting the frame title, and calling onOpenChange(true) to show the modal.

symbols.does: Refreshes the currently mounted face when a write triggers gallery:rerender.
symbols.description: The seam-weld handler compares element_id to the current address and either re-emits decision:rendered for decision mode or re-invokes DNA.renderGallery for corpus mode, best-effort and non-throwing.

symbols.does: Opens or holds open the modal when a decision card renders and advertises its metadata.
symbols.description: Handles decision:rendered by entering decision mode, clearing loading state, storing address/subtype/render_kind, updating data attributes, setting the title, opening the modal, and emitting decision:ready for drivers.

symbols.does: Closes the corpus face on wheel deselect while ignoring selection changes during a decision walk.
symbols.description: Listens to projection:select and closes the modal only when decision mode is not active and the event carries no address, preventing decision walks from being killed by wheel deselection.

symbols.code_id: code://company/surface/app/src/gallery/GalleryMount.tsx::onKey | function | const onKey = (e: KeyboardEvent) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') dismiss() } // Esc closes via the same path (returns to the inbox if from-inbox)
symbols.does: Dismisses the modal when Escape is pressed.
symbols.description: A keydown listener that routes the Escape key to the shared dismiss callback, preserving the inbox-return behavior when the decision originated from the inbox.

symbols.does: Polls DNA.renderGallery until the requested decision card appears in the container.
symbols.description: The inner polling function of openDecision: it clears stale content, shows loading, checks for a data-decision-address match, retries renderGallery on rejection up to ~80 times, and stops once the card renders.

symbols.does: Listens for decision:open events and routes them into the shared openDecision opener.
symbols.description: Handles the inbox or other surface components dispatching decision:open, forwarding the address/id and fromInbox flag to openDecision so decision cards share a single render path with URL deep-links.
